subcodes.title: Words to Mirza Lotfullah, spoken on 1914-01-23
subcodes.first_line: Now that thou hast decided to live in Aleppo, thou must act, speak and conduct thyself
subcodes.subjects: @cleanliness and refinement, @spiritual transformation, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @goodly deeds; actions, @material world a reflection of the spiritual, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
